content: We can reframe the original open-source Reflexion agent framework as a layered "mirror gallery" that integrates the multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection research, where each inconsistent reflection trajectory acts as a separate mirror that highlights different blind spots in the agent's problem-solving. This design lets the agent avoid overfitting to a single biased self-critique and improve performance on long-horizon reasoning tasks by synthesizing contradictory feedback across perspectives.
